parameters.prompt:
Create a detailed image prompt for an AI image generation tool to create engaging social media graphics for this Facebook post:

Title: {{ $json.title }}
Topic: {{ $json.topic }}
Content: {{ $("Facebook Content Generation").item.json.text }}

Requirements:
- Create professional, business-focused social media graphics
- Include relevant visual elements (tax documents, charts, business people, Israeli context)
- Use Tax4Us brand colors and style
- Make it engaging and shareable
- Include text overlay space for key points
- Specify the style (modern, professional, clean)
- Include aspect ratio 1:1 for Facebook
- Ensure it stands out in social media feeds

Return only the image prompt text, no additional formatting.

value.Title: ={{ $json.title }}
